positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast seamless pattern featuring bioluminescent celestial flora and abstract geometric root systems. The composition must be centered and highly decorative, suitable for repeatable tiling on apparel. Use a deep midnight blue or indigo background contrasting sharply with glowing neon emerald greens, teal, and iridescent gold accents. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau elegance, scientific botanical illustration, and cosmic energy, emphasizing clean silhouettes, crisp line work, and mystical depth. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, 8k, perfect print quality.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, low quality, noisy, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, deformities, asymmetrical, gradient background, messy, childish
